title: PBPK Model for Bioequivalence Waiver (FDA DDT-Qualified)
source: synthetic (inspired by FDA-qualified PBPK models used for bioequivalence waivers in generic drug applications)

validation_evidence.reference: Grimstein et al. 2019 - PBPK model qualification for BE waiver across 30+ drugs
FDA Office of Clinical Pharmacology 2022 - Independent PBPK BE waiver validation
Zhang et al. 2020 - PBPK sensitivity to formulation and population variability

regulatory_precedent: FDA DDT qualification of PBPK for bioequivalence waiver decisions (2018)
FDA accepted >40 PBPK-based BE waivers in ANDA submissions (2015-2024)
EMA guideline on PBPK modeling for drug-drug interaction and BE (2018)
